source.note: This is a mocked perception output. Replace with real vision model output in implementation.

observed_features.value: dominant red surface with possible yellow highlight
small darker area near the top, possibly a stem or top indentation

unverified_hypotheses.source: possible vision label or user context
unverified_hypotheses.rule: Do not commit this label as knowledge until user confirmation creates an Experience.

non_semantic_constraint: Perception describes observed features only. It does not decide what the object is.
